preReview.title: ​Austin FC v San Diego FC: Depleted visitors to draw on 'underdog mentality'
preReview.description: San Diego FC have enjoyed the second-best unbeaten start of any expansion team in MLS history, ahead of Sunday's clash with Austin FC.
